notes: Primary shared water impact bloom. Compact, readable, and impact-only.
prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style water attacks. Show only a compact splash impact bloom with a glossy cyan-blue core, bright white highlights, and a crown of clean droplets. Make it readable in a battle overlay, side-on or front-on, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Keep the effect as a single isolated impact element, not a projectile. The shape should feel premium, crisp, and energetic.
negative_prompt: no checkerboard, no black background, no surf wall, no muddy foam, no travel trail, no beam, no character, no arena, no UI, no logo
